tagline: A one-stop shop for all areas of landscaping

hero.headline: Your Entire Outdoor Vision, One Trusted Team
hero.subheadline: For over 23 years, Greenscapes Landcare has transformed properties across Maricopa County. Landscaping, pools, irrigation, trees — we handle it all so you get one team, one call, and one beautiful result.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Solutions<br class="hidden md:block">Under One Roof
services.subtitle: Stop juggling multiple contractors for your property. Greenscapes handles landscaping, pools, trees, and irrigation — all with the accountability of a single family-owned team.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Installation
cards.description: Full-service landscape construction including grading, colorscaping, artificial turf, outdoor lighting, and custom designs that transform your property from the ground up.

cards.title: Hardscape Construction
cards.description: Custom pavers, outdoor BBQ areas, block walls, stucco, fire pits, and mailboxes. We build the outdoor structures that bring your living space to life.

cards.title: Commercial Property Maintenance
cards.description: Ongoing turf, shrub, and tree care for apartment complexes and multi-housing communities. Includes fertilization, weed control, pest control, and soil analysis.

cards.title: Smart Irrigation Systems
cards.description: Weathermatic Premier Partner delivering 38% average water savings. We design, install, and repair smart irrigation systems recognized by the U.S. EPA WaterSense program.

cards.title: Professional Tree Service
cards.description: Expert tree removals, trimming, and fertilization through our sister company Turning Leaf LLC. Keeping your trees healthy and your property safe.

cards.title: Pool Design & Construction
cards.description: Custom swimming pool design, construction, and repair through our sister company Pool Hub LLC. From concept to first splash, we build your dream pool.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Outdoor Space

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Tell us about your property and vision. We'll visit your site, assess the scope, and deliver an honest, detailed quote within 48 hours. No pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Build It Right
steps.description: Our licensed, bonded crew handles every detail — from landscape design and irrigation to hardscapes and pool construction. One team, zero headaches.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Transformed Property
steps.description: Your outdoor space looks incredible and stays that way. We offer ongoing maintenance plans so your investment is protected year-round across the Arizona seasons.

about.label: Why Property Owners Trust Us
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 2003 — Built on Handshakes, Not Shortcuts
about.description: For over two decades, the Greenscapes family has been transforming properties across the Phoenix metro area. What started as a small commercial maintenance crew has grown into a full-service operation covering landscaping, pools, trees, and irrigation — but we never lost the personal touch. Every project gets the same attention to detail, whether it's a 200-unit apartment complex or your backyard patio.

features.title: Licensed, Bonded & Insured
features.description: Full licensing with BBB accreditation and A+ rating since 2011. Your property and investment are always protected.

features.title: One Team, Complete Solutions
features.description: Landscaping, pools, trees, irrigation — all under one roof with sister companies Turning Leaf and Pool Hub. No more juggling contractors.

features.title: 23 Years of Proven Results
features.description: Serving Maricopa County since 2003 with long-term client relationships that speak louder than any ad. We earn your trust every visit.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprise Invoices.
pricing.subtitle: Get a detailed quote for your project upfront. We believe in honest pricing that respects your budget and your property.

guarantee.headline: Our "Done Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any work doesn't meet the standard we promised, we come back and make it right at no additional cost. We've built our reputation over 23 years on standing behind every project — from a simple trim to a full landscape overhaul. Your satisfaction isn't negotiable.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Arizona?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Maricopa County including Glendale, Phoenix, Scottsdale, Tempe, Mesa, Chandler, Gilbert, Peoria, Surprise, and surrounding communities. If you're in the Phoenix metro area, we can help.

faqs.question: Do you handle both residential and commercial projects?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in apartment complexes and multi-housing communities, and we also provide full residential landscaping, hardscapes, pools, and tree services. Same quality, any scale.

faqs.question: Can you handle my entire outdoor project — landscaping, pool, and irrigation?
faqs.answer: That's exactly what we do. Through Greenscapes and our sister companies Turning Leaf LLC and Pool Hub LLC, we offer a true one-stop-shop for landscaping, pools, trees, and irrigation. One point of contact, one cohesive design.

faqs.question: How do your smart irrigation systems save water?
faqs.answer: As a Weathermatic Premier Partner, we install water-efficient smart systems that deliver an average of 38% water savings. Our systems are recognized by the U.S. EPA WaterSense program and adapt to Arizona's climate automatically.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Greenscapes Landcare is fully licensed, bonded, and insured. We've been BBB accredited with an A+ rating since 2011 and hold certifications from the Arizona Landscape Contractors Association (ALCA) and Arizona Multihousing Association (AMA).

testimonials.name: Rachelle R.
testimonials.text: What I appreciate most about Greenscapes is how open they are to receiving feedback and supporting their customers with any questions or concerns. Excellent service.

testimonials.name: Mike M.
testimonials.text: We had a complete front and back landscaping redesign done by Greenscapes Landcare. We would recommend this company and its workers to anyone for any project.

testimonials.name: Haley H.
testimonials.text: Awesome company we've been working with them for about 2 years now and have nothing but good things to say! Reliable, professional, and always responsive.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform Your
Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure property assessment. One call covers landscaping, pools, irrigation, and trees — because your outdoor space deserves one expert team.

footer.description: Family-owned landscape company serving Maricopa County since 2003.
